findings.recommendation: Apply 'rules not stories' principle: the 'Agent Development Use Cases' section (133 lines, lines 1354-1486) contains tutorial content — supported development type listings, agent-flexible vs. script guidance with verbose examples, settings.json permissions documentation, todo script integration walkthrough — that belongs in /dev or docs/reference, not in a command execution file. The 'Example End-to-End Workflow' section (41 lines) is a tutorial walkthrough that duplicates what the step-by-step implementation above already defines. Target reduction: 174 lines (11% -> ~3%). Reference: convert.md cleanup (commit 2d21631) reduced 113 lines (-22%) by removing similar verbose sections.
